chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 200 of 2024 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 16.05.2024 Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan >>>>>..<<<<< Petitioner has filed a statement, withdrawing the petition. No one is present on behalf of the petitioner even otherwise. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge ARBROHI
